title: Diamond Dreamstage 2.0 Arise Luxe Plush Quilted Hybrid 15" Mattress

seo.title: Diamond Dreamstage 2.0 Arise Luxe Plush 15" Hybrid Mattress | LA Mattress
seo.description: Diamond Dreamstage 2.0 Arise Luxe — 15" plush hybrid with Cooling Copper memory foam + 7-Series pocketed coils. 20-year warranty. Queen $1,599 with free same-day LA delivery + 120-night exchange.

metafields.custom.tagline: Cooling-copper plush hybrid — the pressure-relief pick for side sleepers.
metafields.custom.lede: Diamond's Dreamstage 2.0 Arise Luxe Plush builds a soft-feel hybrid around copper-infused memory foam and a 7-Series individually pocketed coil unit, with HD foam-encased edges that hold the perimeter under real load. A cool-temperature quilted top keeps the surface from running hot. 15 inches tall, plush feel, 20-year warranty.
custom.best_for: Side sleepers who need pressure relief at the shoulder and hip
Hot sleepers — copper-infused foam moves heat off the body
Couples — pocketed coils isolate motion transfer
Anyone trading up from a worn-out plush pillow-top
custom.not_ideal_for: Strict stomach sleepers — too soft to keep the spine flat
Heavier shoppers (300+ lbs) who'd want the Medium or Firm build instead

custom.highlights.title: Cooling copper memory foam
custom.highlights.body: Copper conducts heat away from the body — keeps the contour layer from heat-soaking.

custom.highlights.title: 7-Series pocketed coils
custom.highlights.body: Each coil moves independently — supports the spine without amplifying partner movement.

custom.highlights.title: HD foam-encased edge
custom.highlights.body: Reinforced perimeter so the bed feels usable corner-to-corner, even when sitting on the side.

custom.highlights.title: 15-inch luxury build
custom.highlights.body: Quilted Euro-style top + transition foam + coil unit + base — engineered to outlast a typical plush.

description_html:
The Diamond Dreamstage 2.0 Arise Luxe Plush is a 15-inch quilted hybrid mattress built around a cooling-copper memory-foam contour layer and a 7-Series individually pocketed coil system, with HD foam-encased edge support. The result is a soft-feeling surface that still holds its shape under pressure — the configuration that side sleepers and hot sleepers tend to land on after a half-hour on the showroom floor.

What's inside

  • Cool-temperature regulating quilt — phase-change yarns in the cover pull heat off the sleep surface so the contour foam doesn't trap it.
  • Air Response Foam — open-cell top layer that breathes and bounces back instead of compressing flat.
  • Cooling Copper Memory Foam — copper-infused contour layer; copper conducts heat 10× better than the dyes typical foam uses for cooling claims.
  • CertiPUR-US HD comfort foams — independently certified for low-VOC content; tuned as the transition stack between the plush top and the coil unit.
  • 7-Series Individually Pocketed Coils — each coil works in its own fabric pocket, so motion on one side of the bed doesn't telegraph to the other.
  • HD Foam-Encased Edge Support — high-density rails around the perimeter so the bed is usable to the edge, including when you sit on it to put on shoes.

Who it's for

Plush feel — a true 4 / 10 on Diamond's firmness scale. That's where side sleepers find shoulder relief without sinking past the support layer, where hot sleepers benefit from the copper layer, and where a back-and-side combo sleeper gets enough give to switch positions cleanly. Strict stomach sleepers should look at the Dreamstage 2.0 Arise Luxe Medium or Firm instead — at plush, the hips drop too far for spinal-neutral alignment.

Sizes & prices

Twin, Twin XL, Full, Queen, King, and California King. Queen from $1,599. Pricing on each size shows in the selector above.

What's included

  • Free white-glove delivery + setup anywhere in Los Angeles on $499+ orders.
  • Free haul-away of your old mattress on every Queen+ delivery.
  • Same-day delivery on orders placed by 4 p.m.
  • 120-night comfort exchange.
  • 20-year Diamond Mattress warranty against manufacturer defects.
